title: Maximum Requests Without Violating the Limit
titleCn: 不违反限制的最大请求数

detail.title: Maximum Requests Without Violating the Limit
hints: For each user, maintain a sorted list (array) of their request times.
For each user, slide a window over their times; if the count inside any inclusive interval of length window exceeds k, remove the most recent request(s) in that interval until the count <= k.
